name: ComfyUI — image & video generation
description: Node-graph web UI for diffusion models (Stable Diffusion / SDXL / Flux, video via AnimateDiff/SVD). The image's default launch already binds 0.0.0.0 on port 8188 — open the returned URL in a browser. Bundles ComfyUI-Manager so checkpoints and custom nodes install from the UI at runtime; set HF_TOKEN / CIVITAI_TOKEN for gated downloads. No models ship in the image. Needs ~10 GB VRAM for SDXL.

requiredResources.description: CUDA GPU; ~10 GB VRAM for SDXL, more for Flux/video
